data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures that user data is encrypted both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.2+ for data in transit.

data.title: Access Control Policies
data.description: Implements strict access control measures to protect user and system data.
data.technical_spec: Employs role-based access control (RBAC) and multi-factor authentication (MFA).

data.title: Threat Monitoring Systems
data.description: Proactively monitors for unusual activities or potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Uses advanced SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) systems with real-time alerts.

data.title: Periodic Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security assessments to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Engages external cybersecurity firms for penetration testing and compliance checks.

data.title: Incident Response Protocol
data.description: Established procedures for quickly addressing security incidents.
data.technical_spec: Includes automated logging, analysis, and a 24/7 incident response team.
